channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump to headline 250th celebration on National Mall after several artists withdraw.
item.description: Martina McBride, Bret Michaels, Young MC and others have declined to perform.

item.title: Complete transcript of Cindy McCain's appearance on 'Face the Nation' on May 31, 2026
item.description: Below is the full transcript of the interview with Cindy McCain, executive director of the U.N. World Food Programme, part of which aired...

item.title: White House reports Trump in 'excellent health' after physical exam
item.description: President Trump's physician stated in a letter released Friday that the president is in 'excellent health,' following a physical earlier this week at Wa...

item.title: Spurs win Western Conference, defeat Thunder 111-103 in Game 7 to reach NBA Finals
item.description: Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs began the Western Conference finals with a win in Oklahoma City and ended the series there as well
